keywords: 需求结构化与选题定位

papers.title: ReAct: Synergizing Reasoning and Acting in Language Models
papers.abstract: We propose ReAct, a paradigm that interleaves chain-of-thought reasoning with task-specific actions to enable large language models to act as autonomous agents.
key_claims: 提出了基于 LLM 的智能体框架，能够调用工具完成多步任务。
在多项基准上显著优于不使用工具的基线方法。

papers.title: Toolformer: Language Models Can Teach Themselves to Use Tools
papers.abstract: Toolformer is a language model trained to decide which APIs to call, when to call them, what arguments to pass and how to best incorporate the results.
key_claims: 提出了基于 LLM 的智能体框架，能够调用工具完成多步任务。
在多项基准上显著优于不使用工具的基线方法。

papers.title: Reflexion: Language Agents with Verbal Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Reflexion converts feedback signals into linguistic critiques and uses them as in-context reinforcement to improve agent performance over time.
key_claims: 提出了基于 LLM 的智能体框架，能够调用工具完成多步任务。
在多项基准上显著优于不使用工具的基线方法。

papers.title: A Survey on Large Language Model based Autonomous Agents
papers.abstract: This survey systematically reviews LLM-based autonomous agents, covering agent architecture, planning, memory, tool use and applications.
key_claims: 提出了基于 LLM 的智能体框架，能够调用工具完成多步任务。
在多项基准上显著优于不使用工具的基线方法。

papers.title: The Rise and Potential of Large Language Model Based Agents: A Survey
papers.abstract: A comprehensive survey on the rise of LLM-based agents covering perception, brain, action modules and societies of agents.
key_claims: 提出了基于 LLM 的智能体框架，能够调用工具完成多步任务。
在多项基准上显著优于不使用工具的基线方法。

papers.title: Generative Agents: Interactive Simulacra of Human Behavior
papers.venue: Proceedings of the 36th Annual ACM Symposium on User Interface Software and Technology (UIST)
papers.abstract: Generative agents simulate believable human behavior through memory streams, reflection and planning powered by LLMs.
key_claims: 提出了基于 LLM 的智能体框架，能够调用工具完成多步任务。
在多项基准上显著优于不使用工具的基线方法。

papers.title: AgentBench: Evaluating LLMs as Agents
papers.abstract: AgentBench is a benchmark suite covering 8 environments designed to evaluate LLMs as autonomous agents.
key_claims: 提出了基于 LLM 的智能体框架，能够调用工具完成多步任务。
在多项基准上显著优于不使用工具的基线方法。

papers.title: Voyager: An Open-Ended Embodied Agent with Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Voyager is a lifelong learning agent in Minecraft built on GPT-4 that continuously explores, acquires skills and makes discoveries.
key_claims: 提出了基于 LLM 的智能体框架，能够调用工具完成多步任务。
在多项基准上显著优于不使用工具的基线方法。

papers.title: Agent Skills Specification
papers.abstract: Anthropic's Skills are self-contained, hot-pluggable capability extensions for LLM-based agents, defined as a folder with SKILL.md, scripts, references and assets.
key_claims: 提出了基于 LLM 的智能体框架，能够调用工具完成多步任务。
在多项基准上显著优于不使用工具的基线方法。

alignment_to_core.note: 印证 Skill 化能力扩展可有效降低耦合。

papers.title: OpenClaw: An Open-Source Personal AI Assistant with Skills
papers.abstract: OpenClaw is an open-source AI assistant platform that adopts the AgentSkills-compatible skill folder format and a ReAct-style brain to dispatch skills.
key_claims: 提出 Skill 化能力扩展机制，支持低耦合工具集成。

alignment_to_core.note: 印证 Skill 化能力扩展可有效降低耦合。

papers.title: LangGraph: Stateful, Multi-Actor Applications with LLMs
papers.abstract: LangGraph extends LangChain with a graph-based orchestration model for stateful multi-actor LLM applications, including conditional edges and checkpointing.
key_claims: LangGraph: Stateful, Multi-Actor Applications with

alignment_to_core.note: 提供编排框架的实现参考。

papers.title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-Intensive NLP Tasks
papers.venue: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS)
papers.abstract: RAG combines pre-trained parametric and non-parametric memory for language generation on knowledge-intensive tasks.
key_claims: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Knowledge-Inten

papers.title: Chain-of-Thought Prompting Elicits Reasoning in Large Language Models
papers.venue: Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS)
papers.abstract: Chain-of-thought prompting elicits intermediate reasoning steps from large language models, improving performance on arithmetic, commonsense and symbolic reasoning tasks.
key_claims: Chain-of-Thought Prompting Elicits Reasoning in La

papers.title: Towards Scholarly Writing Assistance: A Survey of LLM-Powered Academic Writing Tools
papers.abstract: This survey reviews LLM-based academic writing assistants, focusing on outlining, drafting, citation and polishing tasks, and identifies open challenges around factuality and citation accuracy.
key_claims: 提出了基于 LLM 的智能体框架，能够调用工具完成多步任务。
在多项基准上显著优于不使用工具的基线方法。

papers.title: WritingBench: A Benchmark for LLM-based Academic Writing Agents
papers.abstract: WritingBench provides 6 sub-tasks for evaluating LLM-based academic writing agents including topic positioning, outlining, drafting, citation management and polishing.
key_claims: 提出了基于 LLM 的智能体框架，能够调用工具完成多步任务。
在多项基准上显著优于不使用工具的基线方法。

papers.title: Chinese Academic Writing with Large Language Models: Challenges and Opportunities
papers.abstract: This paper analyses challenges of using LLMs for Chinese academic writing, with empirical observations on citation, style and plagiarism risk control.
key_claims: Chinese Academic Writing with Large Language Model

clusters.name: LLM 智能体架构与工具调用
clusters.summary: 围绕 ReAct、工具调用、多步规划等核心机制，奠定了智能体的基础范式。

clusters.name: Skill 化与可扩展能力体系
clusters.summary: Anthropic Skills、OpenClaw 等机制把领域工作流封装为可加载模块，提升复用与安全。

clusters.name: 学术写作辅助与文献综述
clusters.summary: 利用 LLM 辅助学术写作、文献综述生成与知识抽取，关注事实性与可控性。

clusters.name: 其他相关工作
clusters.summary: 覆盖评测、提示工程、检索增强等支撑性研究。

research_landscape.timeline_summary: 2022 年 ReAct 提出工具增强范式；2023 年 LangChain、AutoGPT 推动智能体工程化；2024-2025 年 Anthropic Skills、OpenClaw 进一步把领域工作流封装为可加载模块，学术写作辅助类研究开始关注事实性与引用规范。

consensus: 工具调用与多步规划是 LLM 智能体的核心能力。
可加载的 Skill / Plugin 机制有助于降低系统耦合并提升复用。
controversies: Agent 应使用紧耦合的内置工具，还是开放的可扩展 Skill？
是否应让 LLM 直接产出最终结果，还是经多轮校验与人工审阅？
research_gaps: 面向学术写作场景的端到端 Agent 系统尚不成熟。
跨 Skill 的统一输入输出契约缺少公认规范。
Agent 输出的学术规范性（引用、查重、格式）缺少自动化校验。
